text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Wednesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, November 27. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Here is what I recommend. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Refinancing is a great leverage point. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the recent logs for that. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Managing some allergy issues today. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. First United Mortgage offered 5.8% with zero points. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I can run some projections for you. A rate of 5.8% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. CareConnect prep is moving along. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
